<!-- Same transposed empty-corner shape as the roster fixture, but with some
     value cells filled and some columns entirely unused (a partially filled
     form). Values must thread both the col-0 field label (row header) and the
     per-entity column label. -->
<table><tbody><tr><td></td><td>Member 1</td><td>Member 2</td><td>Member 3</td><td>Member 4</td></tr><tr><td>Full Name</td><td>Ada Example</td><td>Ben Sample</td><td>Cy Test</td><td></td></tr><tr><td>Staff No.</td><td>024878</td><td>103048</td><td>105611</td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>
